summary: Frontend testing completed for pembayaran (payment history) and pengaturan (edit profile + change password) pages. All 7 features tested and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Pembayaran page correctly implements stats cards (Total Pembayaran, Transaksi Sukses, Menunggu Pembayaran)
Pembayaran page has working search input and filter buttons (Semua, Sukses, Pending, Gagal)
Pembayaran table is sortable with all required columns (Invoice, Kelas, Tanggal, Jumlah, Metode, Status, Aksi)
Filter buttons correctly filter table rows by status
Pengaturan page shows Foto Profil section with user avatar and session info (name, email, role)
Pengaturan has Informasi Profil form with all fields (Nama, Email readonly, Telepon, Bio, Alamat) and Simpan Profil button
Pengaturan has Ubah Password section with toggle show/hide for password fields
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
All UI components use dummy/static data as expected
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - all data is static/dummy in components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pembayaran and Pengaturan pages tested and working. Pembayaran at /dashboard/pembayaran has stats cards, search, filter buttons, and sortable transaction table with 6 dummy transactions. Pengaturan at /dashboard/pengaturan has Foto Profil section, Informasi Profil form (5 fields), and Ubah Password section with show/hide toggle. Both pages use dummy data and show success messages on save.
tests_passed: /dashboard/pembayaran shows stats cards (Total Pembayaran Rp 12.300.000, Transaksi Sukses 4, Menunggu Pembayaran 1)
/dashboard/pembayaran has filter buttons (Semua, Sukses, Pending, Gagal) with data-testid
/dashboard/pembayaran has sortable transaction table with Invoice, Kelas, Tanggal, Jumlah, Metode, Status, Aksi columns
/dashboard/pembayaran filter buttons filter the table rows correctly (tested all 4 filters)
/dashboard/pembayaran search filters by invoice ID and class name
/dashboard/pengaturan shows Foto Profil section with user avatar (initial 'U') and info from session
/dashboard/pengaturan has Informasi Profil form (Nama, Email readonly, Telepon, Bio, Alamat) with Simpan Profil button
/dashboard/pengaturan has Ubah Password section (Password Saat Ini, Password Baru, Konfirmasi) with toggle show/hide
/dashboard/pengaturan Simpan Profil button shows 'Profil berhasil disimpan!' success message
/dashboard/pengaturan Ubah Password button shows 'Password berhasil diubah!' success message

pembayaran_page.stats_cards: Total Pembayaran (Rp 12.300.000), Transaksi Sukses (4), Menunggu Pembayaran (1)
pembayaran_page.search: Search input with placeholder 'Cari invoice atau kelas...'
pembayaran_page.filters: Semua, Sukses, Pending, Gagal buttons with active state styling
pembayaran_page.table_columns: Invoice, Kelas, Tanggal, Jumlah, Metode, Status, Aksi
pembayaran_page.table_data: 6 transactions with different statuses (4 sukses, 1 pending, 1 gagal)
pembayaran_page.actions: Invoice download for sukses, Bayar Sekarang for pending

pengaturan_page.foto_profil: Avatar with initial, name, email, role from session
pengaturan_page.informasi_profil: Nama Lengkap, Email (readonly), Nomor Telepon, Bio (textarea), Alamat
pengaturan_page.ubah_password: Password Saat Ini (with toggle), Password Baru (with toggle), Konfirmasi Password Baru
pengaturan_page.buttons: Simpan Profil, Ubah Password with success messages
